title: Ettelbruck, Diekirch Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ettelbruck, Diekirch Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ettelbruck is a city in Diekirch Canton with a population of 8,900. A charming market town in northern Luxembourg at the confluence of the Alzette and Sauer rivers, known as the gateway to the Ardennes.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
